description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a driveway, a small garden with trees and shrubs, and a covered entryway with glass doors. The exterior walls are primarily white and pink, with some areas in dark gray or black, and large windows are present on the upper floor. The rear of the house has a balcony and a large wooden sliding door, while the sides are mostly solid with minimal window openings. The landscaping is minimal but includes a small lawn and paved walkway. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a geometric design, large windows, and a mix of white, pink, and dark gray exterior walls. Features include a driveway, balcony, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entryway with glass doors, small garden, and upper balcony.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly solid white wall, a single door, and visible garden area to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large wooden sliding door, pink walls, and a balcony above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dark walls, minimal windows, and a view of the front garden and entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and minimal openings on the sides
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with glass double doors, a small porch, and landscaped steps leading to the main entrance
